sentences.target: Ma sœur est une peste parfois.

translations.fr: Ma sœur est une peste parfois.
translations.en: My sister is a pest sometimes.
translations.es: Mi hermana a veces es una pesada.
translations.de: Meine Schwester ist manchmal eine Nervensäge.
translations.it: Mia sorella a volte è una rompiscatole.
translations.ru: Моя сестра иногда бывает настоящей занозой.
translations.pt: Minha irmã às vezes é uma chata.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim bazen tam bir baş belası.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi đôi khi thật phiền phức.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is soms een lastpak.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन कभी-कभी बहुत परेशान करती है.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου είναι μερικές φορές σπαστική.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er noen ganger skikkelig plagsom.
translations.ro: Sora mea uneori e o pacoste.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je někdy pěkně otravná.
translations.da: Min søster er nogle gange vildt irriterende.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'sœur'; marks ownership.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copula, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to a predicative complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the predicate noun.
Common noun; here a pejorative for a person, serving as the predicative nominal complement of 'est'.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the clause to indicate occasional occurrence.

sentences.target: Cette voisine est une vraie peste.

translations.fr: Cette voisine est une vraie peste.
translations.en: That neighbor is a real pest.
translations.es: Esa vecina es una verdadera pesada.
translations.de: Diese Nachbarin ist eine echte Nervensäge.
translations.it: Quella vicina è una vera rompiscatole.
translations.ko: 그 여자 이웃은 정말 성가신 사람이야.
translations.zh-Hans: 那位女邻居真是个讨厌鬼。
translations.yue: 嗰個女鄰居真係好煩人。
translations.pt: Essa vizinha é uma verdadeira chata.
translations.tr: Şu komşu tam bir baş belası.
translations.vi: Người hàng xóm đó đúng là phiền phức.
translations.nl: Die buurvrouw is een echte lastpak.
translations.hu: Az a szomszéd nő igazi púp a hátamon.
translations.hi: वो पड़ोसन सच में बड़ी परेशान करने वाली है.
translations.el: Αυτή η γειτόνισσα είναι πραγματικά σπαστική.
translations.sv: Den där grannen är riktigt jobbig.
translations.ro: Vecina aceea e o adevărată pacoste.
translations.da: Den der nabo er virkelig irriterende.
translations.ja: あの隣人は本当に厄介だ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies a particular referent.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copula, 3rd person singular present; links subject and predicate.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the predicate noun.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'peste' to intensify/qualify the noun.
Common noun used pejoratively for a person; predicate nominal complement of 'est'.

sentences.target: Léa est une peste avec lui.

translations.fr: Léa est une peste avec lui.
translations.en: Léa is a pest to him.
translations.es: Léa es una pesada con él.
translations.de: Léa ist ihm gegenüber eine Nervensäge.
translations.it: Léa è una rompiscatole con lui.
translations.pt: Léa é uma chata com ele.
translations.tr: Léa ona karşı tam bir baş belası.
translations.vi: Léa hay làm phiền cậu ấy.
translations.nl: Léa is een lastpak voor hem.
translations.hi: लिया उसे बहुत परेशान करती है.
translations.el: Η Léa είναι σπαστική μαζί του.
translations.nb: Léa er skikkelig plagsom mot ham.
translations.da: Léa er irriterende over for ham.
translations.fi: Léa on tosi rasittava häntä kohtaan.
translations.ja: レアは彼に対して意地悪だ。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; head of the subject.
Copula, 3rd person singular present; links subject and predicate.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the predicate noun.
Common noun used pejoratively for a person; predicate nominal complement of 'est'.
Preposition introducing a complement indicating accompaniment or relation.
Stressed 3rd person singular pronoun (masc.); object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: On parle de la peste au musée.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də la pɛst o myze/

translations.fr: On parle de la peste au musée.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də la pɛst o myze/
translations.en: People are talking about the plague at the museum.
translations.es: En el museo hablan de la peste.
translations.de: Im Museum spricht man über die Pest.
translations.it: Al museo si parla della peste.
translations.zh-Hans: 在博物馆里，人们在谈论瘟疫。
translations.yue: 喺博物館入面有人講緊瘟疫。
translations.pt: No museu falam sobre a peste.
translations.vi: Ở bảo tàng, mọi người đang nói về dịch hạch.
translations.ar: في المتحف يتحدث الناس عن الطاعون.
translations.nl: In het museum praten ze over de pest.
translations.hi: संग्रहालय में लोग प्लेग के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Στο μουσείο μιλάνε για την πανούκλα.
translations.nb: På museet snakker folk om pesten.
translations.id: Di museum orang-orang membicarakan wabah pes.
translations.sv: På museet pratar man om pesten.
translations.ro: La muzeu se vorbește despre ciumă.
translations.cs: V muzeu se mluví o moru.
translations.da: På museet taler man om pesten.
translations.ja: 博物館ではペストについて話している。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; generic or 'we'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes speaking/talking.
Preposition introducing the topic/complement 'la peste'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'peste'.
Common noun referring to the infectious disease; complement of 'de'.
Preposition contracted with the masculine singular article ('à + le'); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au', indicating location.

Cette voisine est une vraie peste.
Léa est une peste avec lui.
On parle de la peste au musée.
